name: Trolley
description: Mass payouts API for paying contractors, freelancers, and sellers across 210+ countries.

seo.title: Trolley — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Trolley: Mass payouts API for paying contractors, freelancers, and sellers across 210+ countries.

when_to_use: Mass payouts to 210+ countries for freelancer platforms
W-9 and W-8 tax form collection for contractor payouts
Automating 1099 reporting for US marketplace payouts

cons: FX and fees add up for small payouts
review.verdict: Strong payouts plus tax compliance for marketplaces and creator platforms — beats rolling your own globally.
review.best_for: Marketplaces and platforms paying contractors or creators in 50+ countries with tax compliance
review.not_for: Companies needing payment acceptance or US-only simple payouts
